channel.title: Projects on Hi, I'm Sam 👋🏾🙂
channel.description: Recent content in Projects on Hi, I'm Sam 👋🏾🙂

item.title: blog
item.description:
footer to the bottom of the page tags do not honour the correct posts ie #virgo is on on does that say virgo, not kumba steps to add social media icons steps for dark mode switch how to ensure this is responsive? search function possible?

For a quick cheatsheet, check out https://simplemde.com/markdown-guide.

This article offers a sample of basic Markdown syntax that can be used in Hugo content files, also it shows whether basic HTML elements are decorated with CSS in a Hugo theme.
